**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Xiangyun Electric Vehicle Co., Ltd. presents a classic profile of an aborted or defunct 'Low-Speed Electric Vehicle' (LSEV) project from the early 2010s EV boom. The 'Apple Inc.' corporate hallucination has been fully excised. Established in 2013 in Jiangyin City with a seemingly substantial 20 Million RMB paid-in capital, it was registered to manufacture 'Electric Vehicles'. However, the physical reality is fatal: it reports exactly 0 insured employees, and its last insurance update was in 2017. Furthermore, its registration address ('Wuxu Village') points to a rural/village location, not a heavy industrial auto-manufacturing park. Manufacturing actual passenger EVs requires thousands of workers, massive robotic assembly lines, and national regulatory qualifications. This entity lacks all of these. It is definitively a dormant shell, likely a failed venture attempting to capitalize on the early rural LSEV (electric tricycle/micro-car) market, and currently possesses absolutely zero physical manufacturing capacity.
